settings.lede: Hand-picked enterprise gear — routers, switches, access points, NAS, storage, compute and more. All backed by Perth-based technical support.

settings.bestseller_lede: Real-time bestsellers based on the last 7 days of orders.

settings.kicker: CUSTOM AI AGENTS · POWERED BY EVOLVE AI
settings.title_html:
Your business.
Your own AI agent.
From A$999.
settings.description_html: Stop renting generic chatbots. We build, host, and train a custom AI agent that speaks your brand voice, knows your products, and runs on an Australian VPS — all powered by the Evolve AI neural engine. One upfront build fee, optional monthly hosting, zero vendor lock-in.
settings.pricing_kicker: BUILD PACKAGES · ONE-OFF FEE + OPTIONAL HOSTING
settings.pricing_sub: Every build fee includes VPS provisioning, front-panel setup, and agent training rounds. Monthly hosting is optional — host it yourself if you prefer.
settings.process_title: From brief to live agent — in about two weeks.
settings.data_title: You bring the data. We bring the brain.
settings.data_desc: We don't pretend to know your business better than you do. You hand over the FAQs, policies, past conversations, product specs, or SOPs you want the agent to know — we handle the cleaning, embedding, training, and hosting. Your raw data stays in Australia and is never used to train any external model.

settings.title: Your own AI agent
settings.description: Custom-trained on your business data. Answers questions like your best employee would — 24/7, in your brand voice.

settings.title: Front-panel dashboard
settings.description: A web control panel where you view every conversation, edit replies, retrain on corrections and track analytics.

settings.title: Australian VPS hosting
settings.description: Deployed on a Perth-located VPS. Sovereign data residency, AUD billed, low-latency for Australian users.

settings.title: Training & tuning
settings.description: We ingest your docs, train the agent, and run two refinement rounds with you before go-live. Post-launch support included.

settings.title: Customer Support Agent
settings.description: Answers FAQs, troubleshoots common issues, escalates hard tickets to a human. Replies on your site, WhatsApp, and Messenger.

settings.title: Booking & Qualification Agent
settings.description: Qualifies leads, books meetings straight into your calendar (Google / Microsoft 365) and captures intake forms conversationally.

settings.title: Shopify Product Advisor
settings.description: Reads your catalogue, recommends the right product, answers spec questions, and hands over to checkout. Fully Shopify-native.

settings.title: Internal Knowledge Agent
settings.description: Your staff's private ChatGPT, trained on your SOPs, HR handbook, and internal docs. Saves induction time and tribal knowledge loss.

settings.title: Reception / Intake Agent
settings.description: Handles after-hours enquiries, triages jobs, and routes urgent ones to SMS. Ideal for tradies and service businesses.

settings.title: Custom Build
settings.description: Got something specific? A voice-note transcriber, a quoting agent, an onboarding bot — if you can brief it, we'll scope it.

settings.title: Single-channel agent
settings.features:
• One custom-trained agent
  • Deployed on one channel (website widget)
  • Front-panel dashboard (view + edit)
  • Australian VPS provisioned & handed over
  • Training on your provided data (up to ~50 pages)
  • 2 refinement rounds pre-launch
  • 14 days post-launch support

settings.title: Multi-channel agent
settings.features:
• Everything in Starter
  • Up to 3 channels (web + WhatsApp + email/Messenger)
  • Brand-voice training from your past content
  • Analytics dashboard (conversations, CSAT, conversions)
  • Calendar booking integration
  • Shopify / Xero read access (optional)
  • 30 days post-launch support

settings.title: Business integration
settings.features:
• Everything in Growth
  • Up to 3 linked agents (e.g. Support + Sales + Intake)
  • Custom integrations (CRM, ticketing, Google Workspace)
  • White-label front panel for your team
  • Handoff-to-human workflow with routing rules
  • Role-based access for staff
  • 90 days post-launch support + quarterly retraining

settings.title: Brief
settings.description: 30-minute strategy call. We define the agent's job, success metric and channel.

settings.title: Data hand-off
settings.description: You upload FAQs, docs, website content, policies. We clean, chunk and embed it.

settings.title: Train & deploy
settings.description: We train the agent on Evolve AI, provision the VPS and wire the front panel.

settings.title: Go live
settings.description: Two refinement rounds with you, then launch on your website, WhatsApp or channel of choice.

settings.lede: Every EvoTech SaaS application is sold standalone or bundled — all powered by EvolveAI-Engine. Start with one, grow into the full stack without a migration.

settings.headline: Four steps from sign-up to outcome.
settings.lede: Onboarding is fast — most customers go from free-trial to first automated workflow in under 30 minutes.

settings.title: Generate Workflow
settings.body: Pick a template or describe an outcome. EvolveAI-Engine assembles the workflow.

settings.title: Create APIs
settings.body: One-click OAuth into 400+ apps — no auth code to write.

settings.title: Collect Data
settings.body: Real-time observability on every run with full audit trail.

settings.title: Analyse Outcomes
settings.body: Exec-ready dashboards — and compliance packs ready to export.

settings.headline: Everything you wanted to ask.
settings.lede: Pricing, data residency, integrations, onboarding — all answered below.

settings.question: What is EvolveAI-Engine?
settings.answer: EvolveAI-Engine is the flagship autonomous-AI engine that powers every EvoTech SaaS app. It lives at evolve.evotech.au and runs every workflow, SOC triage, compliance check, and governance review across the ecosystem.

settings.question: Is my data stored in Australia?
settings.answer: Yes — all data is hosted in Australian AWS regions with optional single-tenant isolation. No data leaves AU soil.

settings.question: How do custom AI agents work?
settings.answer: You give us the data you want the agent to know — FAQs, SOPs, product info, past conversations. We clean it, train an agent on EvolveAI, provision a Perth-based VPS, and ship you a front-panel dashboard. Two refinement rounds are included before go-live.

settings.question: Can I buy just one SaaS app?
settings.answer: Yes. Every product is sold standalone. Add more later with no migration.

settings.question: Is support included?
settings.answer: Yes — Perth-based human support on every plan, with 1-hour SLA on paid tiers and 24/7 coverage on Scale.

settings.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
settings.answer: Yes — 30-day unconditional refund on any annual plan.

settings.headline: Let's modernise your entire stack.
settings.lede: From hardware to Managed IT to six AI-powered SaaS apps and custom AI agents — one conversation is all it takes.
